title: barista NDJSON progress event
description: Schema for a single line of `barista … --output ndjson`. Each line of the stream is a self-contained JSON object validating against this schema. The `event` field discriminates the variant; per-variant required fields are enforced via `if`/`then` branches in `allOf`. The terminal `result` event embeds the full structured document (per `pull.json` / `grind-tree.json` / future schemas) in `payload`, so NDJSON consumers can recover the same data as `--output json` by keeping the final `result` line.

event.description: Discriminator. `started`/`completed` bookend a run; `resolving`, `fetching`, `fetched`, `cached`, `writing-lockfile` mark in-flight phases; `error` signals a failure; `result` is the terminal envelope carrying the full structured document in `payload`.

coord.description: Maven coordinate the event refers to, in `group:artifact:version` form. Required for `fetching`, `fetched`, and `cached`; absent for run-level events.

phase.description: Coarse-grained phase tag (`resolve`, `fetch`, `lock-write`, `pour`). Optional; useful for UIs that group events by phase.

progress.description: Optional progress percentage in `[0, 100]`. Typically attached to `fetching` for byte-level progress, or to `resolving` for resolved-node count.

payload.description: Free-form per-event payload. For `result` events this MUST be the full structured document (pull/grind-tree/pour/...); for `error` events it carries diagnostic detail; for other events it is reserved for variant-specific extensions.
